requirement_refs.summary: Summarize what changed, what was linked, what was verified, and why formal claims remain blocked.

requirement_refs.summary: Document Step 2 impact scope and sidecar-first rollback expectations without touching primary evidence.

changed_modules.change_scope: Build Step 2 software validation, audit trace, fingerprint, and release sidecars.
Load file-backed reviewer artifacts and summarize rollup visibility without enabling DB by default.
Expose software validation sidecars to results payloads and reports rows.
Keep review_center aware of software validation / audit readiness artifacts.
Reference software validation / audit readiness artifacts from workbench recognition readiness.
